description: The CryptoTrackerApp project is open in Android Studio. The app is supposed to display real-time cryptocurrency prices from the CoinGecko API, but the current implementation uses hardcoded static data in CryptoListActivity. Replace the hardcoded data with live data fetched from the CoinGecko API (/coins/markets endpoint) using Retrofit 2.9.0, OkHttp 4.12.0, and coroutines. The implementation must include INTERNET permission, 15-second timeouts with a logging interceptor, and mapping for the id, symbol, name, current_price, price_change_percentage_24h, and market_cap fields. Handle network errors (UnknownHostException, HttpException, and SocketTimeoutException) by displaying a Toast message. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. Ensure the project compiles successfully.
